---
name: 🎨 UI Enhancement
about: Propose visual dashboard improvements, adjustments, or transitions
title: 'style: '
labels: UI/UX, enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the visual enhancement**
A clear and concise description of the UI module, component, or layout area you want to enhance (e.g. watchlist table alignments, chart responsiveness, theme switcher animations).

**Proposed Solution**
What visual modifications do you suggest? (Include CSS parameters, component edits, color values, or animation speed values if possible).

**Screenshots / Mockups**
If possible, attach screenshots showing the current state and mockups of the desired visual improvement.

**Additional Context**
Any details about viewport sizes (Mobile, Tablet, Desktop) or browser specific layouts.
